metadata.name: Set Up a Tuition Payment Plan

description: A student cannot pay their tuition in full and wants to enroll in a monthly payment plan.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and their outstanding tuition balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student's identity and the amount due.

nodes.task_description: Explain the available payment plan options, including the number of installments and any service fees.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly presents the payment plan terms.

nodes.task_description: Enroll the student in their chosen payment plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully enrolls the student in the 4-month payment plan.
